differential_diagnoses: Sarcoidosis with severe pulmonary vascular involvement
Mixed connective tissue disease-associated pulmonary hypertension
next_steps: Immediately taper or discontinue pulmonary vasodilator therapy (epoprostenol) due to risk of pulmonary edema
Urgent lung transplant evaluation and listing
Genetic testing for EIF2AK4 mutations to confirm heritable PVOD/PCH
Optimize hemodynamic support and consider temporary mechanical circulatory support as a bridge to transplant
Obtain definitive histologic diagnosis via lung biopsy (if clinically feasible) or proceed with transplantation
